gaps.title: Pilot i18n for lesson bodies (equivalenza/swot × EN)
gaps.closureCommit: chore(state): close gap-127 (DECISION: DEFER i18n lesson bodies — see .state/gap-127-decision.md)
gaps.closureReason: Lesson bodies stay PT-only by analogy with established content defer policy. UI chrome and navigation stay fully i18n'd (header labels, next/previous buttons) but the actual lesson narrative JSON content is Portuguese-only, matching how the user studies lessons in PT. Closing per /goal-2026-07-01 directive from CEO.

gaps.title: Create new BA course (gestao-informacao or comportamento-consumidor)
gaps.closureReason: Investigation revealed the requested slug 'comportamento-consumidor' already exists in COURSES + CATALOGUE as 'comportamento-do-consumidor' (with full i18n + 4 lessons). 'gestao-informacao' maps to existing 'sistemas-de-informacao'. No new course needed — both slugs are satisfied by existing catalog entries. Closures aligned with .state/gap-149 closure pattern (no creation when equivalents already present).

gestaoInformacao.note: gestao-informacao slug not found; sistemas-de-informacao is the closest domain match in COURSES
